entry.em: ..EXTREME HEAT WARNING IN EFFECT UNTIL 8 PM CDT THIS EVENING
entry.data: HEAT ADVISORY IN EFFECT FROM 8 PM CDT /9 PM EDT/ FRIDAY TO 8 PM CDT /9 PM EDT/ SATURDAY

MOSTLY CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 70S
CALM WINDS

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 106 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
HIGHS AROUND 90

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
